description: PRD-22: Generous whitespace, refined empty states, dark mode gaps, and interactive feedback polish

userStories.title: Increase page-level vertical spacing for editorial feel
userStories.description: Modern apps like Ramp and Linear use generous vertical spacing. Update page-level containers: (1) Dashboard.jsx line 49: change 'py-6' to 'py-8', (2) Activity.jsx main container: ensure py-8, (3) Analytics.jsx main container: ensure py-8, (4) JobBoard.jsx main container: ensure py-8. Also add 'space-y-6' (or gap-6) between major Dashboard sections (StatsBar, FilterBar, content area) if not already present. Do NOT change padding on Settings or auth pages (they're already good).
acceptanceCriteria: Activity, Analytics, JobBoard main containers use py-8
Dashboard sections have consistent gap-6 or space-y-6 between them
No layout breaks on mobile or desktop

userStories.title: Refine EmptyState component for premium feel
userStories.description: EmptyState.jsx needs refinements: (1) Increase icon size from h-10 w-10 to h-12 w-12, (2) Change icon color from text-gray-300 to text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 for better visibility, (3) Change title from text-sm to text-base for better hierarchy, (4) Change description from text-xs to text-sm for readability, (5) Increase vertical padding from py-16 to py-20, (6) Add max-w-md to the container for better text measure on wide screens. Keep mb spacing as-is.
acceptanceCriteria: Icon is h-12 w-12 with text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500

userStories.title: Add dark mode variants to StatsBar MetricCard
userStories.description: StatsBar.jsx MetricCard (around line 85-91) is missing dark mode variants on two elements: (1) The label span 'text-sm text-gray-500' needs 'dark:text-gray-400', (2) The value span 'text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-900' needs 'dark:text-gray-100'. The icon already has correct styling. Review all MetricCard elements for dark mode completeness.
acceptanceCriteria: All text in MetricCard is readable in dark mode

userStories.title: Add active:scale press feedback to all primary and secondary buttons
userStories.description: Add 'active:scale-[0.98]' to BUTTON_PRIMARY and BUTTON_SECONDARY tokens in designTokens.js for tactile press feedback. This pattern already exists in NotesEditor.jsx and ContactForm.jsx buttons. By adding it to the tokens, all buttons using those tokens get the effect automatically. Also add it to BUTTON_DANGER. Do NOT add it to BUTTON_GHOST (ghost buttons should stay flat).

userStories.title: Standardize responsive page padding across all pages
userStories.description: Standardize responsive padding on all page main containers to 'px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8' for better mobile experience. Current state: Dashboard.jsx uses 'px-6' (no mobile breakpoint), JobBoard.jsx uses 'px-4 py-6 sm:px-6', Activity.jsx and Analytics.jsx need checking. Update: (1) Dashboard.jsx line 50: 'px-6' → 'px-4 sm:px-6', (2) Audit Activity.jsx, Analytics.jsx, Calendar.jsx, OfferComparison.jsx for consistent responsive padding. Only fix inconsistent ones — if a page already uses responsive padding correctly, leave it.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard uses px-4 sm:px-6 responsive padding
All page containers use consistent responsive px pattern
No layout breaks on 320px viewport width

userStories.title: Add cursor-pointer to all clickable non-button elements
userStories.description: Several interactive elements use div or span with onClick but lack cursor-pointer, making them feel unresponsive. Audit and fix: (1) Activity.jsx timeline entries — if they have onClick handlers, ensure cursor-pointer, (2) JobCard.jsx — the main card container should have cursor-pointer if clickable, (3) KanbanCard.jsx — card container should have cursor-pointer, (4) Any other div/span with onClick that lacks cursor-pointer. Do NOT add cursor-pointer to elements that already have it or to non-interactive elements.
acceptanceCriteria: All clickable divs/spans have cursor-pointer class
Non-interactive elements do NOT have cursor-pointer
Buttons are excluded (they have cursor-pointer by default)
